title: Travellers Map
description: Travellers Map is a Minecraft minimap mod, with all its features it's suitable for all player types.
body:
Travellers Map is a minimap mod, that was created as a submission to the MMD Mod Jam. It adds a dynamic, interactive map to your Minecraft game, allowing you to easily navigate through your world, and locate points of interest such as villages, temples and other structures. The map is visible at all times, allowing you to easily check your surroundings and plan your next move. You can also access a full-screen version of the map by pressing a keybind (which can be customized in the mods settings).

In addition to displaying the terrain and structures of your world, Travellers Map also includes a number of features to help you on your adventures. These features include (but are not limited to):

* Waypoints: You can create custom waypoints on the map to mark important locations, such as your base or a hidden cave you discovered.
* Minimap: A small minimap is display in the corner of your screen, allowing you to quickly check your surroundings, without having to open the full map.
Overall, Travellers Map is a useful and convenient tool for players of all skill levels, making it easier to explore and navigate your Minecraft World.

It is also important to note, that Travellers Map is undergoing a rewrite and upgrade to obtain all the features that were planned, but weren't possible in the short timeframe of the modding jam.

You can find a short (1 minute) review of the mod here:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZxlXu8IpfRk

**NOTE:  
If you want to showcase this mod somewhere, thank you.
But I'd appreciate if you could wait for feature completeness with the 1.0 release
Feedback as well as Questions can be posted in our Discord**

## Warning/Disclaimer
There are only 2 safe and legit places to get this mod, [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/) and [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com). If you are seeing this on any other site, be aware that this was copied with permissions, and the site may hide malware in mod files.

### FAQ

**Q: How to scale/move the Minimap?  
A:** You can do both either in the Config, or trough the settings menu, which can be opened trough the Fullscreen Map, with the cogwheel.
All you need to do is move the minimap there around or scroll over it to scale it.

**Q: The sources repository is currently private?  
A:** Yes, I have made it private temporarily. If you want access, feel free to message me on Discord. It will be made public again at a later point in time.
